positive: A vibrant, stylized, minimalist design featuring a majestic golden retriever puppy silhouette running through a field of blooming wildflowers. The style is inspired by Art Deco meets modern botanical illustration, rendered with clean vector lines and solid blocks of color. The composition should be perfectly centered, making the silhouette pop against a gradient background of deep sapphire blue fading into soft lavender. The contrast between the golden fur texture and the saturated background must be high. The overall aesthetic must be suitable for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing clean edges and flat graphic color fields. Detailed elements include delicate meadow grasses and stylized abstract sunrays emerging from the top corner. Perfect symmetry, crisp focus, maximalist contrast, graphic design, flat lay, suitable for commercial merchandise.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, grainy, watermark, logo, text, dirty, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, grayscale, monochrome, poor composition, realistic photography, low contrast
